title: Avoid using 'this' in constructors
description: The use of 'this' in constructors can expose partially-constructed objects to other threads in multi-threaded environments. This rule raises an issue when 'this' is assigned to any globally-visible object in a constructor, and when it is passed to the method of another object in a constructor.
recommendation: Avoid using 'this' in constructors or use it with caution.
impact: Exposure of partially-constructed objects to other threads in multi-threaded environments.

checks.message: Avoid using 'this' in constructors or use it with caution.
